payload.title: Thoughts Site daemon config can now adopt Site-local source support
payload.summary: Narada proper now supports timer fact-only projection and a bounded inbox_drop source that emits inert filesystem.change facts. The remaining work belongs to the thoughts Project Site authority: update its local daemon config/runtime from mock fallback to timer or inbox_drop as appropriate, then verify inside that Site.
evidence: Narada proper task chapter 1056-1059 implemented docs/product/site-local-daemon-sources.md, TimerSource fact-only projection, and InboxDropSource.
Do not mutate /home/andrey/src/thoughts from Narada proper; route this as a pending Site config handoff.
proposal: In the thoughts Site, change the daemon source from mock fallback to an explicit timer or inbox_drop source, run its local verification, and record the Site-local evidence there.
payload.recommendation: Treat as thoughts Project Site configuration/materialization follow-through, not Narada proper doctrine work.
